lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing on this shipwreck?

lines.speaker: Old man
lines.text: Shipwreck?!? Not shipwreck, surely not! Just in port, that's all!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't be silly - half the ship's missing!

lines.speaker: Old man
lines.text: No no no - the captain's just waiting for the wind to change, then we're off!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean this skeleton sitting here in this chair?

lines.speaker: Old man
lines.text: You must show more respect to the Captain.

lines.speaker: Old man
lines.text: Wonderful, wonderful! Mother's coming to get me!
